Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision followed by SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision followed by SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Reject' occurs

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision followed by SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision' occurs

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision followed by SW-EIC Minor Revision
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Minor Revision' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision that occur after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision that occur after SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that originated from a major revision cycle
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision' occurs

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that originated from an initial submission
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' occurs

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Awaiting EIC Decision appears more than once
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurring after at least one instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision that occur in cases where SW-Reviewer Declined also occurred
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision that directly follow a reviewer agreement (SW-Reviewer Agreed) without intermediate reviewer-related activities
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision followed by SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision that are not eventually followed by any EIC decision (i.e., process ends without resolution)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-EIC Accept' and activity != 'SW-EIC Reject' and activity != 'SW-EIC Major Revision' and activity != 'SW-EIC Minor Revision' and activity != 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to total number of EIC-related decision points (including RW-Awaiting EIC Decision and RSW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'RW-Awaiting EIC Decision' or activity == 'RSW-Awaiting EIC Decision'"}"
